key_insights.insight: A title doesn't give you power; influence, talent, and execution do.
key_insights.quote: A title isn't going to give you power... you have to convince the people who are around you that you are right, that you have a good idea and that they should input into that thing.

key_insights.insight: True freedom comes from enjoying what you're doing, not just being able to do whatever you want.
key_insights.quote: Freedom isn't just like, I can do whatever the hell I want. Freedom is that like, I can be working on a campaign and not sleep for three days because I'm so excited about it.

key_insights.insight: Letting go to find your destiny means actively releasing preconceived notions and being open to unexpected paths.
key_insights.quote: The letting go for me is like the letting go of preconceived ideas about what it is that you are going to do.

key_insights.insight: Your intuition is a muscle that needs to be trained; quiet external voices and societal expectations to allow your intuition to guide you.
key_insights.quote: It is like any muscle. You know, you got to work it. You've got to listen to it. You have to make it brave to talk to you.

key_insights.insight: You create your own destiny through constant movement, discovery, and action, not by passively waiting for it to happen.
key_insights.quote: My destiny is not pre-written. But the movements that I make are what lead me to the thing that's actually for me.

key_insights.insight: It's crucial to protect your 'contribution score' by speaking thoughtfully and strategically.
key_insights.quote: You do want to protect your contribution score you don't want to just speak for the sake of speaking.

key_insights.insight: As a leader, it's your job to protect your team's spirit and confidence after a failed idea, making sure they rise again.
key_insights.quote: As a leader, it's like you got to come in and protect the people's spirit...It's not just to pick the good ideas. It's to protect the people, protect the good ideas, protect the bad ideas, like make sure they keep rising every time something bombs.

key_insights.insight: Being selfish in your career and life means prioritizing your own well-being and happiness in every situation.
key_insights.quote: Be selfish in your life, in your career. Think about yourself all of the time.

key_insights.insight: Great marketers are endlessly curious about people, seeking to understand their motivations and choices.
key_insights.quote: Be more curious about people. Ask a lot of questions about people. Why do they do the things they do? Why they like the things?

actionable_advice.advice: Define your own definition of success.
actionable_advice.how_to: Reflect on what truly brings you happiness and fulfillment, and use that as your 'North Star' instead of external measures.

actionable_advice.advice: Train your intuition like a muscle.
actionable_advice.how_to: Regularly practice being quiet and listening to your inner voice, allowing it to lead you even when logic dictates otherwise. Acknowledge and validate your feelings before making big decisions.

actionable_advice.advice: Prioritize your own well-being when making career or relationship decisions.
actionable_advice.how_to: Ask yourself if the situation serves you and actively seek opportunities that align with your happiness and fulfillment. Put your needs above the concerns of others

actionable_advice.advice: Embrace change and be prepared to move on quickly from situations that don't serve you.
actionable_advice.how_to: Regularly assess whether your current job or relationship aligns with your values and goals. Be willing to make a change, even without a clear next step, trusting that opportunities will arise.

actionable_advice.advice: In team meetings, make space for junior team members to contribute.
actionable_advice.how_to: Actively solicit opinions, especially from quieter individuals, to encourage diverse perspectives. Call them out by name if needed to enable contribution.

memorable_stories: The story of how Bozema edited Spike Lee's script as a receptionist, which launched her career.
The anecdote of her Ghanaian mother insisting her daughter's American friends eat traditional Ghanaian food, emphasizing cultural pride.
The heartbreaking stories of Bozema's ex-boyfriend's suicide, and the loss of her unborn child Eve due to medical complications and her rocky relationship with Peter.
The story of her father flying to New York from China to attempt to break her and Peter up.
contrarian_claims: That being selfish isn't necessarily a bad thing and it's essential for living a fulfilling life.
That success comes from a combination of talent, influence and execution, not just from a title or position
You do not need to stay in a job or relationship you dislike for a certain period of time just for appearances.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - CMO Of Netflix, Uber & Apple! Work Life Balance Is BAD Advice! "I Lost My Baby & My Husband!" - Bozoma Saint John
